queries.name: Total Revenue
queries.query: SELECT SUM(total_revenue) as revenue, SUM(total_orders) as orders FROM delta.`abfss://rawdata@adlsrtsae23474.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/regional_performance`

queries.name: Regional Performance
queries.query: SELECT region, total_revenue, total_orders FROM delta.`abfss://rawdata@adlsrtsae23474.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/regional_performance` ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

queries.name: Top Products
queries.query: SELECT product_name, revenue FROM delta.`abfss://rawdata@adlsrtsae23474.dfs.core.windows.net/gold/top_products` ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10
